title: Locan

The '''Locans''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[near-Human]]s that shared its name with<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC Loce">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Loce system/Legends|Loce system]]</ref> celestial body [[Loce]]. They had pointed [[Ear/Legends|ears]], prominent [[Tooth/Legends|incisor teeth]], and distinctive light [[Color/Legends|purplish]]-blue skin. One Locan, [[Talas Piran]], had a thick body frame and a heavy build with large [[Limb/Legends|arms]] the skin on which was black and mottled. Piran had short black [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. Locans identified as belonging to at least one—male—[[Gender/Legends|gender]].<ref name="AIR" />

At some point by [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which establishes that [[Talas Piran]] became [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] at least four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to its setting, represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one year before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the young Locan Talas Piran was captured by [[Slaver/Legends|enslavers]] and taken from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of Loce. He was then sold to a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]–sanctioned company for which he was forced to [[Logger|log]] [[Tree/Legends|trees]] on<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Hintivan">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Hintivan system/Legends|Hintivan system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Hintivan II]]. Years later, Piran bought his freedom and became an enslaver himself, joining the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]], which operated in<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Mytaranor sector/Legends|Mytaranor sector]] and elsewhere, and eventually becoming the organization's leader.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Locans were mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, the Locan Talas Piran was illustrated by [[Christina Wald]].<ref name="AIR" />
